products.name: BrightBeam 200 USB Front Light
products.description: Compact 200-lumen front bike light with USB charging and quick-release handlebar mount. Great for city commuting and casual night rides.

products.name: NightRide Mini Front Light
products.description: Slim, lightweight front light with three modes and tool-free mount. Ideal as a budget-friendly safety light.

products.name: ProLine 600 Front Light
products.description: High-output 600-lumen front light with wide beam pattern for dark trail and road riding. Includes handlebar and helmet mounts.

products.name: BrightBeam Rear Flasher
products.description: Super-bright rear flasher with multiple patterns and wide-angle visibility for safe night riding.

products.name: NightRide Rear Beacon
products.description: Sleek, USB-rechargeable rear beacon with side visibility and integrated seatpost strap.

products.name: CitySafe Rear Light
products.description: Simple battery-powered rear light for casual around-town rides.

products.name: CityLock Combo Cable Lock
products.description: 6-foot combination cable lock, ideal for quick coffee stops and low-risk areas.

products.name: U-Lock Pro Security
products.description: High-security U-lock with double-bolt shackle and included cable for wheels or seat.

products.name: HeavyDuty Chain Lock
products.description: Hardened steel chain with fabric sleeve and key lock for maximum security.

products.name: Reflective Arm & Leg Band 2-Pack
products.description: Adjustable reflective bands to boost side visibility on dark commutes.

products.name: GlideAll All-Temperature Ski Wax 120g
products.description: Universal all-temperature ski and snowboard wax (−8°C to +10°C). Great everyday glide without fuss.

products.name: ColdGrip −8°C Hard Wax
products.description: Hard glide wax optimized for cold, dry snow days around −8°C.

products.name: EdgeMaster Pocket Tuner
products.description: Compact edge tuning tool with preset base and side edge angles. Perfect for quick touch-ups at home or in the parking lot.

products.name: ProFile Adjustable Edge Tool
products.description: Adjustable edge tuner with file and diamond stone holder for precise ski and snowboard edge work.

products.name: Nylon & Brass Brush Kit
products.description: Two-brush kit (nylon and brass) for cleaning bases and brushing out structure after waxing.

products.name: Print-at-Home Gift Card
products.description: Printable gift card redeemable for any ski, snowboard, or bike service and in-store purchases.

products.name: Email Delivery Gift Card
products.description: Digital gift card delivered by email, perfect for last-minute gifting.

products.name: In-Store Physical Gift Card
products.description: Traditional plastic gift card to be picked up and used in-store.

products.name: Wax & Tune Starter Bundle
products.description: Starter kit with all-temp wax, scraper, and nylon brush to keep one pair of skis or a board fast all season.

rental_addons.name: Helmet & Pads Package

rental_addons.name: Premium Protective Gear Bundle

rental_addons.name: Damage Protection Insurance
rental_addons.description: Covers accidental damage to rental or demo bikes, excluding theft and negligence.

rental_addons.name: Bike Lock Rental
rental_addons.description: U-lock or heavy cable lock to secure your rental bike during café stops and errands.

rental_bikes.name: Summit X2 FS Demo

rental_bikes.name: Alpine Kids 24"
rental_bikes.description: 24-inch kids' mountain bike with simple shifting and confidence-inspiring brakes.

rental_bikes.name: City Glide Hybrid

rental_bikes.name: Enduro E-Assist
rental_bikes.description: Long-travel e-MTB with powerful motor for big vertical days and exploring further.

rental_bikes.name: Coastline Gravel 700c

rental_bikes.name: Pavement Pro Road

rental_bikes.name: Summit X2 FS Demo - Medium
rental_bikes.description: Medium-sized demo of the Summit X2 trail bike, great for riders wanting a slightly burlier setup.

rental_bikes.name: Urban Step-Through E-Bike
rental_bikes.description: Comfortable step-through e-bike ideal for sightseeing, commuting, and errand-running around town.

services.name: Standard Ski Tune
services.description: Our go-to standard ski tune: base inspection, edge sharpening, minor base repair, and hot wax for one pair of skis.

services.name: Premium Ski & Snowboard Tune
services.description: Full stone grind, structured base, detailed edge work, and performance wax for skis or snowboards.

services.name: Quick Wax & Edge Touch-Up
services.description: Same-day wax and quick edge touch-up to get your skis or board sliding and gripping better.

services.name: Family Ski/Snowboard Tune Bundle (4–6 Items)
services.description: Discounted family bundle that covers full standard tunes for 4 to 6 skis and/or snowboards on a single ticket.
includes: All-temp hot wax for each item

services.name: Ski Binding Adjustment & Function Test
services.description: DIN setting, binding adjustment, and function test according to current industry standards.

services.name: Bike Tune - Essential
services.description: Baseline tune for bikes that are mostly in good shape: safety check, brake and shifting adjustments, and bolt torque check.

services.name: Bike Tune - Performance (with Drivetrain Cleaning)
services.description: Our most popular bike tune for frequent riders, including full drivetrain cleaning plus detailed brake, shifting, and wheel work.
includes: Shifting adjustment and hanger alignment check

services.name: Bike Tune - Ultimate Overhaul
services.description: Comprehensive overhaul including drivetrain cleaning, hub and headset service, brake bleeds (as applicable), and full re-cabling.
includes: Hub, bottom bracket, and headset service
Complete cable and housing replacement (parts extra)

services.name: Bike Safety Check
services.description: Quick safety inspection before an event or rental: checks brakes, steering, wheels, and tire condition.

services.name: Flat Repair & Tube Replacement
services.description: Fix a flat tire with a new tube installation and safety check of the wheel.

service_area_infos.name: Bike Service & Tune-Ups
service_area_infos.description: Details on our bike tune packages, repair offerings, and typical turnaround times throughout the season.
service_area_infos.additional_info: During peak season (typically April through August), standard bike tunes are usually completed within about 72 hours. Off-season work often turns around in 24–48 hours, and limited rush or next-day service may be available on request depending on schedule.

service_area_infos.name: Ski & Snowboard Service
service_area_infos.description: Information on ski and snowboard tunes, wax services, binding adjustments, and recommended maintenance intervals.
service_area_infos.additional_info: In mid-winter, allow roughly 48 hours for a standard ski or snowboard tune. Early- and late-season work is often completed within 24 hours, especially for basic wax and edge touch-up services.

deals.name: Family Ski/Snowboard Tune Bundle - Holiday Deal
deals.description: Special holiday pricing on our Family Ski/Snowboard Tune Bundle. Get full standard tunes for 4–6 skis or snowboards on a single ticket at a discounted flat rate. Night-before drop-off available on select dates.

deals.name: Standard Ski Tune - Midweek Special
deals.description: Save on our Standard Ski Tune when you book for a Monday–Thursday drop-off during the season. Perfect for keeping your skis in shape between weekend trips.

deals.name: Bike Tune - Performance Spring Tune-Up
deals.description: Spring-clean your ride with our Performance Bike Tune, including full drivetrain cleaning, at a special pre-season price.

deals.name: TrailBlazer FS Demo - Midweek Trail Deal
deals.description: Rent the TrailBlazer 27.5 full-suspension demo bike for a full day midweek at a reduced rate. Great for exploring local singletrack without weekend crowds.

deals.name: Summit X2 FS Demo - Weekend Package
deals.description: Discounted daily rate on the Summit X2 FS Medium demo when booked as part of a Friday–Sunday rental.

deals.name: GlideAll All-Temp Wax Sale
deals.description: Stock up for the season with GlideAll All-Temperature Ski Wax 120g at a limited-time sale price.

deals.name: EdgeMaster Pocket Tuner Special
deals.description: Keep your skis and boards sharp all winter. Save on the EdgeMaster Pocket Tuner when purchased online.

deals.name: U-Lock Pro Security Sale
deals.description: Lock in savings on our U-Lock Pro Security for your daily commute or campus rides.

deals.name: BrightBeam 200 Front Light Intro Price
deals.description: Introductory pricing on the BrightBeam 200 USB Front Light. Pair it with a rear light for a complete visibility setup.

deals.name: Print-at-Home Gift Card Bonus Event
deals.description: For a limited time, select print-at-home gift card amounts may qualify for in-store bonus credit. See details at checkout or in-store.
